Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class WireWithdrawalSchedule

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.WireWithdrawalSchedule
public class WireWithdrawalSchedule extends Object
WireWithdrawalSchedule

A withdrawal transfer schedule using the Wire mechanism
